'''mongawaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:quadlike|quadlike]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-ng-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quadlike|quadlike]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| mongawaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:mongawithi|mongawithi]] || [[word:mongawiji|mongawiji]] || [[word:mongawishi|mongawishi]] || [[word:mongawiki|mongawiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:mongawuthuthu|mongawuthuthu]] || [[word:mongawujuju|mongawujuju]] || [[word:mongawushushu|mongawushushu]] || [[word:mongawukuku|mongawukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:mongawuthu|mongawuthu]] || [[word:mongawuju|mongawuju]] || [[word:mongawushu|mongawushu]] || [[word:mongawuku|mongawuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:mongawufthuf|mongawufthuf]] || [[word:mongawufjuf|mongawufjuf]] || [[word:mongawufshuf|mongawufshuf]] || [[word:mongawufkuf|mongawufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:mongawethe|mongawethe]] || [[word:mongaweje|mongaweje]] || [[word:mongaweshe|mongaweshe]] || [[word:mongaweke|mongaweke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:mongawothotho|mongawothotho]] || [[word:mongawojojo|mongawojojo]] || [[word:mongawoshosho|mongawoshosho]] || [[word:mongawokoko|mongawokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:mongawotho|mongawotho]] || [[word:mongawojo|mongawojo]] || [[word:mongawosho|mongawosho]] || [[word:mongawoko|mongawoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:mongawofthof|mongawofthof]] || [[word:mongawofjof|mongawofjof]] || [[word:mongawofshof|mongawofshof]] || [[word:mongawofkof|mongawofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:mongawïfthïf|mongawïfthïf]] || [[word:mongawïfjïf|mongawïfjïf]] || [[word:mongawïfshïf|mongawïfshïf]] || [[word:mongawïfkïf|mongawïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:mongawïfthïfthïf|mongawïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:mongawïfjïfjïf|mongawïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:mongawïfshïfshïf|mongawïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:mongawïfkïfkïf|mongawïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:mongawïfthïf|mongawïfthïf]] || [[word:mongawïfjïf|mongawïfjïf]] || [[word:mongawïfshïf|mongawïfshïf]] || [[word:mongawïfkïf|mongawïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:mongawïfthïf|mongawïfthïf]] || [[word:mongawïfjïf|mongawïfjïf]] || [[word:mongawïfshïf|mongawïfshïf]] || [[word:mongawïfkïf|mongawïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mongawæthæ|mongawæthæ]] || [[word:mongawæjæ|mongawæjæ]] || [[word:mongawæshæ|mongawæshæ]] || [[word:mongawækæ|mongawækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:mongawathatha|mongawathatha]] || [[word:mongawajaja|mongawajaja]] || [[word:mongawashasha|mongawashasha]] || [[word:mongawakaka|mongawakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:mongawatha|mongawatha]] || [[word:mongawaja|mongawaja]] || [[word:mongawasha|mongawasha]] || [[word:mongawaka|mongawaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:mongawafthaf|mongawafthaf]] || [[word:mongawafjaf|mongawafjaf]] || [[word:mongawafshaf|mongawafshaf]] || [[word:mongawafkaf|mongawafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:mongawasha|mongawasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:mongawshësha|mongawshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mongawrosha|mongawrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mongawmusha|mongawmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:mongawyasha|mongawyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomongawnkshësha|gomongawnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomongawnkrosha|gomongawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomongawnkmusha|gomongawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomongawnkyasha|gomongawnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:mongangawasha|mongangawasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:mongangawshësha|mongangawshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mongangawrosha|mongangawrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mongangawmusha|mongangawmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:mongangawyasha|mongangawyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomongangawnkshësha|gomongangawnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomongangawnkrosha|gomongangawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomongangawnkmusha|gomongangawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomongangawnkyasha|gomongangawnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:mengæwasha|mengæwasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:mengæwshësha|mengæwshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mengæwrosha|mengæwrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mengæwmusha|mengæwmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:mengæwyasha|mengæwyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomengæwnkshësha|gomengæwnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomengæwnkrosha|gomengæwnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomengæwnkmusha|gomengæwnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomengæwnkyasha|gomengæwnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:mongfawasha|mongfawasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:mongfawshësha|mongfawshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mongfawrosha|mongfawrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mongfawmusha|mongfawmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:mongfawyasha|mongfawyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomongfawnkshësha|gomongfawnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomongfawnkrosha|gomongfawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomongfawnkmusha|gomongfawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomongfawnkyasha|gomongfawnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|bfc4f79}}
